Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableAmpUpsellLogging_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Tracks and logs upsell prompts in the AMP (Advanced Monetization Platform).
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand player interactions with upsell offers, enhancing monetization strategies.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string related to the Git repository's hash.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves version tracking and updates for developers, ensuring players get the latest features and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are formatted.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides players with clearer and more accurate time displays in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a faster method to retrieve the Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and performance for developers by speeding up version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes time-related features run faster and more efficiently.

Added_Other.name: FFlagDisableReactSchedulingAvgMaxMsStats_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Disables tracking of average maximum response times for React scheduling.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableAutoLoginAfterRecovery_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Automatically logs users back in after account recovery.
Added_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to access their accounts without extra steps.
